ops.text: A1+A3 COMPLETE. Machinery shipped (26d6f165 + ref-resolution fix b64326f6 — github.job_workflow_sha is EMPTY for same-repo uses:./ calls; falls back to github.sha), reviewed by opus finder+refuter (nested-roots leak, per-plugin error containment, strict-semantics redesign [strict = schedule || explicit input], dead constant, malformed-manifest error, ref guard — all fixed, 15/15 tests). E2E proofs: dry-run table correct (13 plugins incl. concurrent-session design-doc picked up automatically); real dispatch → bot commit 4ef8cdb5 (cli-demo 0.1.1→0.1.2), zero workflows triggered; cache proof: claude plugin update moved repo-bootstrap 0.61.1→0.61.2 and the version-keyed cache dir contains the new test file; push trigger armed + ran green in warn mode (ec7fba1c); weekly strict cron 23 10 * * 1; tag plugin-v1 @ ec7fba1c pushed; strict dispatch proven RED on codex guarded drift. codex drift = concurrent session's unreleased work, owner releases. Ship-refusal gotcha hit twice: shared @ parked on foreign bookmarks (codex-autoregister, worktree-agent-*) — jj rebase -r @ -d main then re-ship. NEXT: A4 rollout ×12 (Claude lanes, codex OAuth revoked + quota-limited until ~Jul 27), A5 docs/template; B redo mining in flight.
